title: Vocabulary Browser
description: The Vocabulary Browser provides a searchable interface to the OMOP standardized vocabularies, enabling researchers to explore concept hierarchies, identify standard and source codes, and assemble concept sets for use in cohort definitions and analyses. Understanding vocabulary structure is fundamental to building precise, reproducible phenotypes in the OMOP ecosystem.
tips: Use the Standard Concept filter to restrict search results to concepts that are valid as criteria in cohort definitions and analyses.
Explore the hierarchy view for a selected concept to discover broader and narrower terms that may need to be included or excluded from your concept set.
Search by source code (e.g., ICD-10, NDC, LOINC) when you have a specific code from an EHR extract and need to find its mapped standard concept.
Save frequently used concepts directly to an existing concept set from the search results page to avoid redundant lookups across sessions.
Check the concept's domain and vocabulary fields before adding it to a concept set to ensure it will match the correct OMOP domain table in your queries.
